description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing AuditEvent entities, providing methods for querying audit logs based on various filters such as creation time, user ID, and event type.

classes.name: AuditEventRepository
classes.description: Spring Data JPA repository interface for AuditEvent entities, enabling CRUD operations and custom query methods based on audit log attributes.

methods.name: findAllByCreatedAtBetween
methods.description: Retrieves a page of audit events created within the specified time range.

methods.name: findAllByUserIdAndCreatedAtBetween
methods.description: Retrieves a page of audit events for a specific user within a specified time range.

methods.name: findAllByEventTypeAndCreatedAtBetween
methods.description: Retrieves a page of audit events of a specific type within a specified time range.

methods.name: findAllByEventTypeAndUserIdAndCreatedAtBetween
methods.description: Retrieves a page of audit events matching both event type and user ID within a specified time range.
